thesis: Funding is hot but trend and ETF flows remain constructive; a pullback into the 67.8-68.1k zone offers a favorable entry against the prior swing low.
factors: Funding spike (anom-001) against a constructive trend and ETF flows
Pullback into the 67.8-68.1k entry zone above the prior swing low
invalidation_reasoning: A close below 66.9k breaks the prior swing low and negates the long structure.
confidence_reasoning: Constructive trend with strong context supports moderate confidence; hot funding tempers it.
recheck_condition: Re-evaluate if funding cools further or price loses the 66.9k invalidation.

size_suggestion.note: Sized for 1% account risk at current ATR.

thesis: Elevated funding plus a correlation break with SPX suggests crowded longs; a rejection at resistance favors a tactical short.
invalidation_reasoning: A close above 70.2k invalidates the rejection and the tactical short.
confidence_reasoning: Counter-trend setup capped to lower confidence despite the correlation break.
recheck_condition: Re-evaluate if price reclaims 70.2k or the SPX correlation normalizes.

thesis: With high-importance CPI three days out and volatility already elevated, risk/reward does not justify a position; stand aside until the print clears.
invalidation_reasoning: No directional position is proposed, so no invalidation applies.
confidence_reasoning: High confidence in standing aside given imminent macro and elevated volatility.
recheck_condition: Re-assess after the CPI print clears.
